title: Quiz: Classical Fourier Transform
description: Test your understanding of the Discrete Fourier Transform

questions.question: What is the computational complexity of the naive DFT algorithm?
questions.explanation: The naive DFT requires N multiplications for each of N output values, giving O(N²).

questions.question: In the DFT formula Xₖ = Σₙ xₙ·ω^(kn), what is ω?
questions.explanation: ω = e^(-2πi/N) is the primitive N-th root of unity.

questions.question: The Fast Fourier Transform (FFT) has complexity O(N log N).
questions.explanation: FFT uses divide-and-conquer to achieve O(N log N) complexity.

questions.question: The DFT transforms data from which domain to which?
questions.explanation: DFT transforms from time/space domain to frequency domain.
